events.title: September 11 attacks
events.description: Coordinated terrorist attacks on the United States by al-Qaeda lead to major global security, political, and military consequences including the US-led War on Terror.

events.title: US-led invasion of Iraq
events.description: Coalition forces invade Iraq, overthrow Saddam Hussein, and engage in prolonged occupation and conflict with major regional consequences.

events.title: Global financial crisis
events.description: A severe global economic downturn triggered by the US housing market collapse and financial sector failures leads to recession, bailouts, and regulatory reforms.

events.title: Arab Spring uprisings
events.description: A wave of protests and uprisings across the Arab world challenges authoritarian regimes, with varied outcomes including regime change, civil war, and reform efforts.

events.title: Russia annexes Crimea
events.description: Following political crisis in Ukraine, Russia annexes Crimea and conflict erupts in eastern Ukraine, straining relations with the West.

events.title: Brexit referendum
events.description: The United Kingdom votes to leave the European Union, initiating a complex political and economic withdrawal process.

events.title: COVID-19 pandemic
events.description: A novel coronavirus emerges and spreads globally, causing widespread illness, deaths, economic disruption, and major public health responses.

events.title: Global political polarization and major elections
events.description: High-stakes elections, rising polarization, and geopolitical competition characterize the early 2020s across multiple regions.

events.title: Russia's full-scale invasion of Ukraine
events.description: Russia launches a large-scale invasion of Ukraine, triggering widespread destruction, humanitarian crisis, sanctions, and global security repercussions.

events.title: Israel-Hamas war escalations
events.description: Renewed large-scale hostilities between Israel and Hamas produce severe humanitarian impacts and regional tensions.

events.title: Climate change intensifies extreme weather events
events.description: Rising global temperatures contribute to more frequent and severe heatwaves, storms, wildfires, and sea-level rise, prompting international policy responses and adaptation efforts.

events.title: India's IT and services boom
events.description: Rapid growth of IT, services, and startups in India drives urbanization, exports, and global integration of Indian tech talent.

events.title: 2001 Gujarat earthquake and reconstruction
events.description: A major earthquake causes widespread destruction in Gujarat, India, prompting large-scale relief and rebuilding efforts.

events.title: Beijing Olympics and China's global profile
events.description: China hosts the Summer Olympics, showcasing economic growth, infrastructure, and international ambitions.

events.title: China's Belt and Road Initiative launched
events.description: China promotes large-scale infrastructure and connectivity projects across Eurasia and beyond, reshaping trade and investment patterns.

events.title: India's Make in India and manufacturing push
events.description: Policy initiatives aim to boost manufacturing, attract investment, and create jobs as India seeks higher-value industrialization.

events.title: COVID-19 pandemic and regional responses in Asia
events.description: Asian countries implement varied public health measures, vaccine campaigns, and economic support to manage the pandemic's health and social impacts.

events.title: Asian climate policy and renewable energy expansion
events.description: Major Asian economies invest in renewables, electric mobility, and climate adaptation while balancing development needs and emissions targets.

events.title: 2022 Pakistan floods and humanitarian crisis
events.description: Unprecedented monsoon rains and glacial melt cause catastrophic flooding across Pakistan, displacing millions and prompting international aid.

events.title: India's G20 presidency and global diplomacy
events.description: India hosts G20 meetings, highlighting development, digital governance, and global economic cooperation priorities.

events.title: China's technology sector regulation and restructuring
events.description: Regulatory reforms reshape major Chinese tech firms' business models, data governance, and market behavior with global implications.
